summary: Tested critical Stop button fix in Deployments page and verified new Analytics/Live Dashboard features. All shift controls (Start/Pause/Resume/Stop) work correctly with proper UI updates. Analytics page shows date range picker, total hours, hours per BnB, hours per category, and daily trend charts. Live Dashboard shows admin date picker for historical data viewing.
critical_code_review_comments: Stop button fix verified: handleStopShift now properly updates local state with setKitShifts(prev => ({...prev, [kit]: updatedShift})) before calling fetchKitShifts
Similar fixes confirmed for handlePauseShift and handleResumeShift functions
Analytics page correctly aggregates data from completed shifts with date range filtering
Live Dashboard correctly shows historical data when admin changes date

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all shift controls, Analytics, Live Dashboard verified)

seed_data_creation: Created UI-TEST-KIT and deployment dep-202603182150427594 for testing shift controls
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stop button bug is fixed - UI now properly updates to show 'Completed' status with duration after stopping a shift. Analytics page shows total hours, hours per BnB chart, hours per category chart, and daily trend chart with date range selection. Live Dashboard shows admin date picker for viewing historical data.
passed_tests: App title 'HA MULTIMODAL MANAGEMENT' displayed on login page
App title 'HA MULTIMODAL MANAGEMENT' displayed on dashboard
Backend: POST /api/shifts/start creates shift with 'active' status
Backend: POST /api/shifts/{id}/pause changes status to 'paused'
Backend: POST /api/shifts/{id}/resume changes status to 'active'
Backend: POST /api/shifts/{id}/stop changes status to 'completed' with calculated duration
Frontend: Start Collection button opens dialog with SSD and Activity Type selectors
Frontend: After starting shift, kit card shows 'Active' status with running timer
Frontend: Pause button changes kit card to 'Paused' status with frozen timer
Frontend: Resume button changes kit card back to 'Active' status
Frontend: Stop button shows 'Completed' status with duration - UI UPDATES CORRECTLY
Frontend: Toast message shows 'Shift completed! Duration: Xh Xm'
Frontend: Completed shift shows duration in blue text
Analytics: Page loads with header 'Analytics - Data collected from shift logs'
Analytics: Date range picker with Start Date and End Date inputs
Analytics: Quick range buttons (Last 7 days, Last 14 days, Last 30 days)
Analytics: Total Hours Collected card shows aggregated hours
Analytics: Total Shifts card shows count of completed shifts
Analytics: Hours per BnB horizontal bar chart
Analytics: Hours per Category horizontal bar chart
Analytics: Daily Trend vertical bar chart
Live Dashboard: Page loads with header 'Live Dashboard'
Live Dashboard: Admin sees date picker with prev/next navigation
Live Dashboard: Total Hours card shows today's hours
Live Dashboard: Completed shifts count card
Live Dashboard: Active Now count card
Live Dashboard: Hours per BnB section with BnB cards
Live Dashboard: Recent Completed Shifts list
Live Dashboard: 'Today' button appears when viewing historical date
Live Dashboard: Historical view shows 'No data for this date' when no shifts exist
